mapper.sql: fsi.id, fsi.server_name, fsi.description, fsi.frontend_uri, fsi.backend_uri, fsi.database_uri, fsi.enabled_flag, fsi.remarks, fsi.attribute1, fsi.attribute2, fsi.attribute3, fsi.attribute4, fsi.attribute5, fsi.create_time, fsi.create_by, fsi.update_time, fsi.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.server_name as ${tAlias}_server_name, ${tAlias}.description as ${tAlias}_description, ${tAlias}.frontend_uri as ${tAlias}_frontend_uri, ${tAlias}.backend_uri as ${tAlias}_backend_uri, ${tAlias}.database_uri as ${tAlias}_database_uri, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_server_information (server_name, description, frontend_uri, backend_uri, database_uri, enabled_flag, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{serverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{frontendUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{backendUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{databaseUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_server_information set server_name = #{serverName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, frontend_uri = #{frontendUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, backend_uri = #{backendUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, database_uri = #{databaseUri,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
